'''Zylurians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with [[Color/Legends|blueish skin]], long hanging nostrils and three fingers. The crew of the [[ZZ-class freighter]] ''[[Mingula]]'' consisted of four Zylurians who were all [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a swarm of [[Ubuugan fleshborer]]s. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] discovered the corpses when he searched the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] for valuables.
